title: RSF Drone Kills 17 at Shukeiri School and Health Clinic, White Nile State
detail: An explosive-laden RSF drone struck a secondary school and a healthcare centre in the village of Shukeiri in White Nile State, killing at least 17 people — mostly schoolgirls — and wounding at least 10 others. One health worker was among those killed. CBC News and other outlets reported that young girls were among the dead. The attack drew widespread international condemnation as a clear strike on protected civilian infrastructure. UN Human Rights High Commissioner Volker Türk expressed alarm at the expansion of the conflict into White Nile state.

media.caption: Drone kills civilians at school and health clinic in White Nile State
